cards.name: Full Moon
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Haste to all Nazgul for 1 turn.

cards.name: Long Shadows
cards.quote: When long shadows fall, old fears wake first.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> to all beasts for 1 turn.

cards.name: Cruel Winter
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. All mountain enemy units have 7.5% chance to become Frozen.

cards.name: Fury of Ulmo
cards.quote: When Ulmo stirs, the deep remembers wrath.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all navy or embarked <sprite name="ws"> units.

cards.name: Secrets from a Lost Tome
cards.quote: Some lore sleeps long before it is fit to be read.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> artifacts in radius 2 and gain +1 <sprite name="mage"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Struck by a Morgul Blade
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Poisoned (2 turns) and Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: MountDoom
cards.quote: MountDoom broods in fire and ash, as though the mountain itself had grown a bitter heart.

cards.name: Dragon-fire
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in radius 1 gain Burning (1 turn); enemies on forest tiles also gain Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: ElvesGoingWest
cards.actionEffect: Apply Despair (1 turn) to all elves in radius 2.

cards.name: BorderPatrolling
cards.quote: A border well watched is a border half held.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the surrounding area in a radius based on the higher of Agent <sprite name="agent"> or Commander <sprite name="commander"> skill, detect nearby enemies, and halt an enemy army commander <sprite name="commander"> in your hex if present.

cards.name: AshesOfGorgoroth
cards.actionEffect: Create a corruption pulse in radius 1-3 based on caster Mage: enemies gain Despair (1 turn), and allied evil characters remove Fear.

cards.name: A Knife in the Dark
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Poisoned (2 turns) and Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: DreadOfTheNoldor
cards.actionEffect: Apply Despair (1 turn) to all Elf characters in radius 2, and apply Fear (1 turn) to enemy elves in the caster's hex.

cards.name: FiresOfDoom
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: apply Burning (1 turn) to all enemy units on wastelands tiles.

cards.name: Rain
cards.quote: Rain washes ash from the road and teaches patience.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: remove Burning <sprite name="burning"> from all units, reduce movement in radius 2, and reduce visibility nearby.

cards.name: Twilight
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: in radius 2, reduce visibility and clear scouting; allied dark-aligned PCs there become temporarily hidden.

cards.name: Flame of Udun
cards.actionEffect: In radius 2, apply Burning (1 turn) and Fear (1 turn) to all enemy units.

cards.name: The Blow of Gorgoroth
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage and apply Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: Scents of the Haradrim
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage and apply Poisoned (2 turns).

cards.name: War spoils
cards.quote: Spoils won by war are often bitter to count.
cards.actionEffect: Gain 2 <sprite name="iron">, 1 <sprite name="steel">, and 1 <sprite name="leather">; choose 1 allied character in this hex to gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> or Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Mounts
cards.quote: Swift mounts carry hope ahead of danger.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Shadows of Ithilien
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden (1 turn), and reveal enemies in radius 1 around the caster.

cards.name: Luglurak Dark Magic
cards.actionEffect: Enemy characters in radius 1 gain Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: A Mithril coat
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (3 turns).

cards.name: Marked by a Nazgul
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Fear (1 turn) and Halted (1 turn).

cards.name: Orc Draught
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a small amount and gain Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: OrcRebellion
cards.actionEffect: Target allied army commander in your hex: gain +1 permanent Commander and lose 1 unit of the weakest army troop type.

cards.name: RageOfUlmo
cards.quote: The deep remembers wrath when Ulmo stirs.
cards.actionEffect: All naval <sprite name="ws"> or embarked <sprite name="ws"> units on water/shore tiles take moderate damage and are Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Hidden in Hides
cards.quote: In rough hides, much that is dear may be concealed.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in your hex are Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn); caster gains Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Raid From The Mountains
cards.actionEffect: All allied army commanders in mountains or hills gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Rallied Men
cards.quote: When the call goes out, old loyalties wake.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Human units gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Empalisades
cards.quote: A palisade hastily raised may still hold a night of dread.
cards.actionEffect: If you are on an allied population center, increase its fortification by 1.

cards.name: Shielded
cards.quote: A shield is but a promise made in wood and steel.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn), and if the target has Fear <sprite name="fear"> remove it.

cards.name: Sniped!
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy in same/adjacent hex: inflict small wound and Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: TheIronCrownRidesAgain
cards.actionEffect: Target allied Nazgul in your hex gains +1 Commander and +1 Mage.

cards.name: Chopping the Trees
cards.actionEffect: If you are on a forest hex, gain +3 timber; beast- or Ent-race characters here are moderately wounded.

cards.name: TheNineRideAgain
cards.actionEffect: All Nazgul gain Haste (3 turns).

cards.name: Traps
cards.quote: A snare laid unseen waits longest of all.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> (1 turn) and Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Well-equipped Army
cards.quote: Well equipped hosts are less shaken by the first terror.
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn).

cards.name: WhenThereIsAWhip
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Haste (3 turns).

cards.name: Morgul Tithe
cards.actionEffect: Morgul Tithe. Unique event logic variant based on ReachOfBaradUngol.

cards.name: Black Gate Sortie
cards.actionEffect: Black Gate Sortie. Unique event logic variant based on RaidFromTheMountains.

cards.name: Shroud of Gorgoroth
cards.actionEffect: Shroud of Gorgoroth. Unique event logic variant based on DoorsOfNight.

cards.name: Sackville-Baggins Grudge
cards.quote: A good name may be guarded more fiercely than gold.
cards.actionEffect: All Hobbits in the hex are Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Uncautious Supper
cards.quote: A flame unwatched at meal may summon the long eye of night.
cards.actionEffect: At supper or rest, Hobbits in radius 2 lose Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and take 15 damage.

cards.name: Doors of Night
cards.actionEffect: Grants Courage to all Dark Servants units for 1 turn and dispels Dawn.

cards.name: Barad-dur
cards.quote: Barad-dûr broods over the ash like the final answer of a will that would not bend.
